creator: basic-monster@web.de
text:
I have still trouble getting minecraft-client on freebsd 9.2 amd64 to 
 work....
 
 I apllied the 5th patch but I still get this error:
 
 [code]
 wnloading: 
 https://s3.amazonaws.com/Minecraft.Download/launcher/launcher.pack.lzma
 Didn't find an update in time.

 resourceUrl = https://s3.amazonaws.com/Minecraft.Resources/

 [16:09:41 INFO]: Unpacking natives to 
 /root/.minecraft/versions/1.7.2/1.7.2-natives-19710535885806
 [16:09:41 INFO]: Launching in /root/.minecraft
 [16:09:45 INFO]: Client> Exception in thread "main" 
 java.lang.UnsatisfiedLinkError:

 unsupported file layout (Possible cause: architecture word width mismatch)

 I already tried to install openjdk7 again what didn't helped either.
